[12/27/25, 5:10:57 PM] Muhammad Hamza Yousaf Office: Kuwait New Rules Update (Dec 2025)
​Important updates for residents and visitors regarding document validity and visa fees:
​📄 Document Validity Requirements
​To ensure compliance with the latest traffic and residency regulations, the following documents must have a minimum validity of 3 months:
​Driver’s Visa: Must be valid for at least 3 months.
​Vehicle Registration Must be valid for at least 3 months.
​Driving License: Must be valid for at least 3 months.
​🛂 Visit Visa Fees (New Structure)
​The Ministry of Interior has implemented a standard fee of 10 KD per month for entry and visit visas:
​3-Month Visit Visa: 30 KD
​6-Month Visit Visa: 60 KD
​Note: Overstaying a visa will result in a fine of 10 KD per day and may lead to a permanent entry ban.
